description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest Docker image. Define a before_script that logs in to the GitLab Container Registry with the CI_JOB_TOKEN and sets an IMAGE variable to $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:${CI_COMMIT_TAG:-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}. Add a single build stage containing a build job that runs docker build -t ${IMAGE} . and then docker push ${IMAGE}. The pipeline consists only of this build stage and has no additional services, caches, or artifacts.
